title: `import std io` Implementation Plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan for adding a blocking std io module (stdin, file, TCP) to Verb via a new std import mechanism.
notes: Structured as an execution plan with checkbox steps and file-by-file instructions, not a decision record, requirements doc, or standalone technical spec — it implements and defers to a separate spec doc. Classified as DOC (context/process artifact) rather than SPEC since the actual technical contract lives in the referenced design spec.
